name: General Electric Company
description: GE Aerospace is a global leader in jet engines, components, and systems for commercial and military aircraft. Following its spin-off from General Electric's energy business in 2024, the company operates as a standalone entity focused on propulsion, services, and systems. With an installed base of approximately 44,000 commercial and 26,000 military aircraft engines, GE Aerospace plays a critical role in the global aviation industry, providing advanced technology and maintenance services that support the safety and efficiency of flight operations worldwide.
